---
name: Security concern
about: Report a potential security issue
title: '[SECURITY] <do not describe the vulnerability here>'
labels: security
assignees: raymondchau
---

## STOP — do not disclose the vulnerability in this issue

Public GitHub issues are visible to everyone.

Please follow the responsible disclosure process described in
[SECURITY.md](../../SECURITY.md) instead:

- Email: **security@pqsafe.xyz**
- PGP key: see SECURITY.md
- Response SLA: 48 hours acknowledgement, 7-day triage

We take all security reports seriously and will credit researchers in our
security advisories.

---

If you are certain this is a **non-sensitive** security-adjacent concern
(e.g. a dependency with a published CVE that does not affect PQSafe),
you may use this issue and fill in the details below:

## Dependency / tooling concern (non-sensitive only)

Package affected:
CVE / advisory link:
Impact assessment:
Suggested fix:
